notes: CycloneDX is a Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) standard. Originally created within OWASP; now stewarded by the OWASP CycloneDX Working Group. The canonical project home is cyclonedx.org. CycloneDX supports SBOM, SaaSBOM, HBOM (hardware), ML-BOM, OBOM (operations), and CBOM (cryptography).

data.description: A lightweight Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) standard designed for application security contexts and supply chain component analysis. Supports SBOM, SaaSBOM, HBOM, ML-BOM, OBOM, CBOM, and VDR (Vulnerability Disclosure Report).
data.notes: Multiple format encodings (JSON, XML, Protocol Buffers). Widely used in modern SBOM tooling — Trivy, Syft, Anchore, Dependency-Track all produce or consume CycloneDX. Companion/alternative to SPDX. A data format; the value-add is in the tools that produce/consume CycloneDX, not in standalone judgement guidance — placed under reference.

urls.note: JSON Schema and XML XSD per spec version
